title: Student Attendances
description: The detailed information of students' attendances at instructional events.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student attendance.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student for whom attendance was taken.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

instructionalEvent.title: Instructional Event
instructionalEvent.description: The instructional event for which the student’s attendance applies.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Event.

instructionalEventInstance.title: Instructional Event Instance
instructionalEventInstance.description: The instance of the instructional event for which attendance was taken.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Event Instance.

attendanceTaken.title: Attendance Taken
attendanceTaken.description: The date and time for which the attendance applies.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: The categorization of the student's attendance.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: A user defined category applied to the student's attendance.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

percentAttended.title: Percent Attended
percentAttended.description: The percentage of the total session time the student was in attendance.
